messages.subject_clean: [R-gui] [ANN] New version of Rpad -- a web-based interface to R
messages.body_plain:
Jerry, The Rpad server has a bad networking card. Hopefully, it'll be
back online tomorrow.

- Tom 

Tom Short
EPRI Solutions, Inc.

 
-----Original Message-----
From: r-sig-gui-bounces at stat.math.ethz.ch
[mailto:r-sig-gui-bounces at stat.math.ethz.ch] On Behalf Of Jerry
Pressnell
Sent: Monday, July 31, 2006 8:35 PM
To: r-sig-gui at stat.math.ethz.ch
Subject: [R-gui] [ANN] New version of Rpad -- a web-based interface to R

Hi Tom,
 
I am having difficulties getting onto the following site (I'm sure it
was there a couple of weeks ago)
 
 
http://www.rpad.org/Rpad/

 

 

Is the site still functioning?

 

Regards 

 

Jerry Pressnell

 


	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

_______________________________________________
R-SIG-GUI mailing list
R-SIG-GUI at stat.math.ethz.ch
https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/r-sig-gui

messages.subject: [R-gui] Tinn-R 1.18.5.5 released
messages.body_plain:
Dear Tinn-R user,

We would like to announce that a new version of the Tinn-R for Windows
(1.18.5.8) was released and is available on SourceForge server:
http://sourceforge.net/projects/tinn-r.

Tinn-R is a R script editor under OS Windows.

To see the changes, please, read: 'Help//English/Readme/HTML'.

Briefly it will be available also on SciViews server: http://www.sciviews.org/Tinn-R

Regards,
Tinn-R team

messages.subject: [R-gui] tktoplevel & tkgetSaveFile options
messages.body_plain:
Dear list

1. Is there some option for mantaining the tktoplevel window always on top?
2. Is there some option to eliminate the border icons maximize, minimize and close of a tktoplevel window?
3. Is possible to avoid the warning message (or changing its contents) in tkgetSaveFile when the file to save already exists?

Thanks,

Manel
messages.body_snippet:
Dear list

1. Is there some option for mantaining the tktoplevel window always on top?
2. Is there some option to eliminate the border icons maximize, minimize and close of a tktoplevel window?
3. Is

messages.subject: [R-gui] tktoplevel & tkgetSaveFile options
messages.body_plain:
On 22 August 2006 at 21:20, Manel Salamero wrote:
| Dear list
| 
| 1. Is there some option for mantaining the tktoplevel window always on top?
| 2. Is there some option to eliminate the border icons maximize, minimize
| and close of a tktoplevel window?

Aren't both of those handled by the windowmanager? 

| 3. Is possible to avoid the warning message (or changing its contents) in
|    tkgetSaveFile when the file to save already exists? 

Couldn't you sail around that and delete the file pre-emptively?

Dirk

-- 
Hell, there are no rules here - we're trying to accomplish something. 
                                                  -- Thomas A. Edison
